calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos
Off Calendar Feb-27-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - LLEWELLYN LEDBETTER, TEL. NO. 240-8154, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - NOTICE WAS NOT GIVEN TO THE OPPOSING PARTY AFTER THE TENTATIVE RULING CAME OUT. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Hearing On Claim Of Exemption of Llewellyn Ledbletter is Granted, in part. The levying officer is directed to withhold $ 100.00 per pay period from Claimant Llewellyn Ledbetter wages to be paid to Judgment Creditor. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Angie Diner, CSR # 9581 =(302/EHG)
